nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: CR
nodes.summary: CR表示 IUCN 极危等级，当前关联174种鸟类，如勺嘴鹬、加州神鹫、菲律宾鹰等174种鸟类。

nodes.name: 黃胸擬管舌鳥
nodes.summary: 黃胸擬管舌鳥（Palila，学名 Loxioides bailleui），在图谱中标记为极危（CR）物种，常见栖息地包括灌丛、稀树草原，主要威胁包括气候变化。

nodes.name: 气候变化
nodes.summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: thumb|left|Closeup (probably of an adult female) The palila favors a māmane and māmane-naio (Myoporum sandwicense) dry forest habitat mix containing, apart from the forest, patches of grasslands, pūkiawe (Styphelia tameiameiae) shrubland on lava fields, and other types of native understory vegetation

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: thumb|left|Closeup (probably of an adult female) The palila favors a māmane and māmane-naio (Myoporum sandwicense) dry forest habitat mix containing, apart from the forest, patches of grasslands, pūkiawe (Styphelia tameiameiae) shrubland on lava fields, and other types of native understory vegetation

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: A 2025 study concluded: "Perhaps the hardest threat to combat is climate change, because Palila population declines are strongly associated with severe drought events that suppress māmane reproduction."
